analysis: The project currently has a basic structure for a website about black holes. The theme needs to be enhanced with a cosmic, dark aesthetic featuring animated black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The existing files show incomplete implementations that need to be updated to match the black hole theme with animated objects and slides.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add CSS variables for cosmic colors, animations for black hole accretion disks, and starry backgrounds.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function, implement mobile menu toggle functionality with smooth transitions, and add event listeners for all interactive elements.
